description_long: This object consists of four compact, rectangular toolboxes arranged in a row, each with a robust, industrial design. The toolboxes feature hard plastic exteriors with reinforced corners and ribbed sides for added durability. Each box is topped with a different color lid—orange, dark gray, white, and yellow—contrasting with the black lower half, and all have visible ventilation or drainage slots on the top. The front of each toolbox displays a yellow-and-black caution stripe and a small, square metallic label, suggesting a utilitarian, safety-conscious design. The lids appear to be hinged and likely open upward, with subtle molded handles integrated into the top surface for easy carrying. The overall appearance is rugged and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A set of four rugged, color-coded toolboxes with reinforced plastic bodies, caution stripes, and integrated top handles. Each box features a durable, industrial look suitable for urban or workshop environments.
description_view_0: Four toolboxes are shown side by side, highlighting their colored lids, caution stripes, and front labels.
description_view_1: The toolboxes are viewed from the end, showing the depth and stacked alignment of the colored lids.
description_view_2: The toolboxes are shown from the opposite side, with the colored lids reversed and caution stripes still visible.
description_view_3: Viewed from the other end, the toolboxes' colored lids are stacked in the reverse order, emphasizing their uniform depth.
attribute_handle_type: Integrated molded plastic handles on the top of each lid, fixed and ergonomic for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Implied front latches, likely plastic or metal snap clasps, visible as small protrusions on the front edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A small square metallic label is visible on the front of each toolbox, but no readable brand or logo is discernible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Internal compartment configuration is not visible, but the exterior suggests a single main compartment per box with a hinged lid.
attribute_external_labeling: yellow-and-black caution stripe on the front
small square metallic label on the front
